headlines.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
headlines.summary: Tesla's earnings report lands in the midst of a slide in the company's stock price even as its core auto business is rebounding.

headlines.title: IBM lowers full-year forecast after earnings warning
headlines.summary: IBM is now looking to improve productivity with artificial intelligence, including with a new coding tool called Bob.

headlines.title: Oil prices rise after Rubio says Iran is not serious about a deal
headlines.summary: The U.S. has launched strikes against Iran for 11 consecutive days, citing a need to "degrade Iran's ability to threaten commercial shipping."

headlines.title: U.S. signs nuclear power agreement with Saudi Arabia
headlines.summary: The agreement will provide U.S. companies with access to Saudi Arabia's nuclear energy program, the Department of Energy said.

headlines.title: OpenAI cyber models broke out of training environment to hack Hugging Face
headlines.summary: The incident is unique because it was "driven, end to end, by an autonomous AI agent system," according to Hugging Face.

headlines.title: Trump vows to bomb Iran's bridges, power plants if it shoots at ships in Hormuz Strait
headlines.summary: He issued his threat after U.S. Central Command hit Iranian targets for an 11th straight night.

headlines.title: John Paulson says we are in the early stages of a long-term bull market for gold
headlines.summary: He said demand for bullion continues to broaden, led by central banks that have been adding to their reserves alongside growing private-sector interest.

headlines.title: Time for a crypto comeback? Traders bet that this stock will lead the way
headlines.summary: Crypto bulls have been waiting for a rebound, and traders think this stock could lead the way.

headlines.title: Tesla shares poised for biggest earnings move in a year
headlines.summary: Shares of Elon Musk's electric vehicle company are expected to see a sharp swing after Tesla rolls out its quarterly report.

headlines.title: Bets against SpaceX grow to 32% of float as Elon Musk warns short sellers won't survive
headlines.summary: About 206 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 32% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 dividend stocks for steady income
headlines.summary: Here are three dividend-paying stocks that are highlighted by Wall Street's top pros, as tracked by TipRanks.

headlines.title: Kalshi adds 3 million new users as prediction market capitalizes on the World Cup
headlines.summary: The prediction market has launched some ads featuring soccer players, as well as formed a partnership to display its brand in more places during the tournament.

headlines.title: ‘I have a $2,000 deductible’: I reported a cracked windshield on my Hertz rental car. Can they charge me?
headlines.summary: “I never heard a rock hit the windshield.”

headlines.title: I want to transfer $17,000 in credit-card debt. Why did Wells Fargo offer me only a $4,000 credit limit?
headlines.summary: “I asked why the limit was so low, but they couldn’t give me an explanation.”

headlines.title: My second husband and I have kids from previous relationships. Should my house go to him or my children if I die first?
headlines.summary: “We live in a house that I purchased entirely with money I had before we were married.”

headlines.title: IBM just cut its outlook, but not by as much as investors feared
headlines.summary: IBM’s official earnings report comes after a bruising profit warning last week.

headlines.title: Yes, the AI stock selloff looks terrifying. But it might actually save the bull market.
headlines.summary: The hottest tech trades of 2026 just got slammed — smart investors are buying anyway.

headlines.title: ServiceNow’s stock rises as earnings show momentum in cybersecurity
headlines.summary: Against a gloomy backdrop for software sentiment, ServiceNow just topped revenue expectations.
